package main

import "fmt"

func main() {
    var qtd_fig_album int
    var qtd_fig_baruel int 

    fmt.Scan(&qtd_fig_album)
    fmt.Scan(&qtd_fig_baruel)

    sequencia := make([] int, 0)
    
    for i := 0; i < qtd_fig_baruel; i++ {
        var x int
        fmt.Scan(&x)

        sequencia = append(sequencia, x)

        fmt.Println(sequencia)

    }

}
